title: Visible Invisible
description: When toggled on you can see mobs/player with invis potion effect.
body:
# 👁️ Visible Invisible: The Ultimate Detection Utility
Are you tired of being ambushed by "invisible" players in PvP? Do you find it frustrating when a stray Creeper with an invisibility effect ruins your hardcore world? Visible Invisible is a streamlined utility mod designed to bring clarity to the shadows.

Instead of removing the potion effect entirely, this mod applies a glowing outline—identical to the Spectral Arrow effect—to any invisible mob or player within your line of sight. This allows you to track their movements clearly while maintaining the standard Minecraft visual style.

# ⌨️ Keybinds & Controls
The mod is designed to be as lightweight and unobtrusive as possible. By default, the controls are mapped to the following key:

[V] Key — Toggle Outlines: Instantly switch the glowing detection On or Off. This allows you to quickly swap between a standard "Vanilla" experience and your enhanced detection mode.

# 🛠️ Features & Functionality
Visible Invisible makes the unseen obvious by highlighting hidden threats:

Spectral Outlining: Invisible entities gain a distinct white outline, making them easy to spot against any background.

Line-of-Sight Based: This mod is designed to be a visual aid, not an X-ray. Outlines appear for invisible entities that are in your field of view.

Toggleable Utility: Use it only when you need it with a single keystroke.

High Performance: Optimized code ensures zero impact on your frame rate.

# ⚠️ Important Disclaimer
While Visible Invisible is a powerful detection tool, please use it responsibly. Many multiplayer servers categorize any mod that highlights players or bypasses potion effects as an unfair advantage.

I am not responsible if you get banned or kicked from a server for using this mod. Always check the specific rules of your community. If "Invisibility Bypassing" or "ESP" style mods are forbidden, do not use this mod on that platform.

# 📺 Media & Links
Check out the mod in action or browse the source code here:

My YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@NLPixel_Shorts

YouTube Showcase: [COMMING SOON]

GitHub Repository: https://github.com/CodingWithWhale/Fabric-VisibleInvisible-1.21.11

# 📝 Feedback & Support
Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please open an "Issue" on the GitHub repository. Your feedback helps make the unseen even more visible!
